codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff commit, current Dashboard quick-switch implementation, and associated test coverage. The feature requirements (quick-switch surface visibility, deterministic switch/launch feedback, duplicate suppression, empty/loading/error recovery, keyboard shortcuts, and accessibility announcements) are implemented in DashboardQuickSwitchView and exercised by the test suite now correctly included in the OpenBurnBarTests target.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill procedure requires manual UI sanity checks, but the handoff reports no interactive checks while still claiming followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: switcher-ui-worker SKILL.md:33 requires manual UI sanity checks; handoff 2026-04-09T13-19-07-438Z__dashboard-quick-switch-ui__654ea300-0925-4c99-a5de-164a7cbdb278.json:31 has "interactiveChecks": []

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill requires context-read evidence before setting followedProcedure=true, but the handoff verification does not include context-read commands.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: switcher-ui-worker SKILL.md:96 defines context-read evidence requirement; handoff verification.commandsRun only lists test commands and git rev-parse in 2026-04-09T13-19-07-438Z__dashboard-quick-switch-ui__654ea300-0925-4c99-a5de-164a7cbdb278.json

sharedStateObservations.observation: The reviewed feature commit includes unrelated BackfillSchedulerTests project-file entries, indicating cross-feature coupling in a supposedly focused fix commit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show 47ddaf6ec2a7bc3a155eae816b27089519e69aed shows BackfillSchedulerTests.swift additions in OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj (e.g., lines 11, 350, 1064, 1553) alongside switcher test-target wiring

summary: Pass. The dashboard quick-switch feature behavior is present and covered, and the reviewed fix correctly wires SwitcherDashboardUITests into the Xcode test target so the intended VAL-DASH coverage executes. Noted shared-state process gaps around skill procedure evidence and commit scoping.
